subject: TestLocalNetworkDiscoveryService — equivalence already covered

covering_tests.scope: Fake's own behaviour surface — non-suspending emit, multi-emit ordering, cross-scheduler rendezvous
test_methods: emit does not suspend when no collector is registered (line 181)
multiple emits before collect all reach the collector (line 199)

covering_tests.scope: Real impl's `_lava._tcp.local.` / `_lava-api._tcp.local.` suffix scoping via matchesServiceType (SP-3.4 cross-match regression guard)
test_methods: lava watcher matches lava service type with local suffix
lava-api watcher matches lava-api service type with local suffix
lava watcher MUST NOT cross-match lava-api service type
lava-api watcher MUST NOT cross-match lava service type
unrelated service types are rejected by both watchers
lava tcp watcher MUST NOT match lava udp service type
normalisation lowercases and strips wrapping characters

design_note: The fake does NOT implement _lava._tcp.local. suffix scoping by design. The fake is a post-resolution injection point — consumers feed pre-resolved DiscoveredEndpoint instances into it. Suffix-scoping happens at the NSD-resolution boundary (in matchesServiceType, called from onServiceFound), which the fake intentionally bypasses. The LocalNetworkDiscoveryService interface contract is 'emit DiscoveredEndpoint', not 'filter by service type'. This is therefore not a behavioural divergence to track in the fake.
user_decision: A — verify existing test coverage; if covered, defer with ledger entry
outcome: Audit resolved by existing tests; no new test created.
